label: 1515 CE
era_summary: Year 1515 (MDXV) was a common year starting on Monday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1515: France, Venice-Milan, Swiss Confederation, emperor, pope, 1515-16. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1515: Turkey (Corsairs)-Spain, Hafsids (Algiers, Djidjelli, Tlemcen), 1514-21; Spain-Indians (Panama), 1515; Spain-Indians (Curacao, Bonaire), 1515. Maddison records GDP/capita 1463 (ESP, 1515) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
